ReviewText: Perfect for my university coding projects!
Best iPhone ever, camera is amazing!
Great noise canceling, worth the price
Dell XPS is a beast for programming!
Samsung S24 has amazing display quality
iPad Pro is perfect for note taking
JBL speaker sound is very loud and clear
ThinkPad is good but a bit heavy
PS5 controller feels amazing in hand
AirPods Pro noise canceling is top notch
USB hub works perfectly with my laptop
MX Master 3 is best mouse I ever used!
HP EliteBook battery life is very good
